overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a lush post-apocalyptic landscape. The character moves from a wooden overlook through dense forests and ancient stone ruins, crossing a moss-covered bridge as the weather transitions from clear skies to rain near a waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden overlook platform transitioning to mountain trail

events.description: steps off wooden platform onto dirt trail
companions stop and kneel while protagonist continues forward

agents.ego_description: walking along a wooden platform then transitioning to a dirt path alongside companions

notable_agents.action: companion character walking alongside then stopping to kneel
second companion walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: weathered wooden deck with railings overlooking the valley
large ancient stone bridge structure spanning the distant valley
misty mountains visible in the background
moss-covered rocky terrain rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wooden overlook platform with views of a distant stone bridge and mountains. The character transitions onto a dirt trail flanked by lush ferns and rocky cliffs, accompanied by two companions who eventually stop while the protagonist continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with dense vegetation

events.description: encounters two travelers walking in the opposite direction on the narrow path

agents.ego_description: jogging along a narrow forest trail surrounded by tall trees and ferns

notable_agents.action: two travelers with packs walking toward the camera on the trail

entered.detail: dense forest canopy creating shade over the path
stone structures becoming visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving through a densely forested section of the trail, the character passes between tall trees and lush ferns. The path narrows as ancient ruins become visible in the distance, and the character passes two NPC travelers walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with ancient stone ruins

events.description: emerges from dense forest into open grassland with scattered trees
approaches and passes between two large mossy stone pillars marking the bridge entrance

agents.ego_description: running through open terrain toward ancient stone bridge structures

entered.detail: tall moss-covered stone pillars flanking the bridge entrance
open grassy areas between scattered trees
water visible below the approaching bridge

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide meadow with scattered trees and ancient stone ruins. The character approaches a mossy stone bridge flanked by tall pillars, with a river becoming visible to the right as the trail leads onto the bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient moss-covered stone bridge over river

events.description: steps onto the mossy stone bridge deck
sky begins to darken and weather starts changing to rain

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the mossy stone bridge over flowing water

entered.detail: ancient stone bridge deck covered in green moss and weathered tiles
ornate carved stone barriers along the bridge sides
fast-flowing water visible just below the bridge edge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an ancient stone bridge with moss-covered tiles and carved railings, spanning a river with visible rapids below. The sky begins to darken as the weather transitions, and the bridge leads toward the far bank with dense trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside trail with waterfall in rain

events.description: rain begins falling heavily as the character leaves the bridge
approaches waterfall at the end of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverside path as rain begins to fall, approaching a waterfall

entered.detail: cascading waterfall at the end of the river visible through the trees
visible rain falling through the scene
thick trees lining both sides of the riverside path

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the bridge, the character follows a riverside trail as rain begins to fall, creating a wet environment with visible rain particles. The segment ends as the character approaches a cascading waterfall at the end of the path, surrounded by dense forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a high wooden overlook through a lush forest and ancient ruins, ending at a rainy waterfall. It begins on a wooden platform overlooking distant mountains before descending onto a dirt trail flanked by ferns and rocky cliffs. As the camera moves deeper into a dense forest of tall trees, the path narrows and reveals ancient ruins in the distance, eventually opening into a wide meadow. The scene then shifts as the character crosses a mossy stone bridge over rushing rapids, while the bright sky begins to darken. Finally, the environment transforms into a wet, rain-swept riverside trail that leads directly toward a cascading waterfall surrounded by thick greenery.
